calendar.matters:
SHORT CAUSE TRIAL
Off Calendar Nov-07-2016 Judgment Entered
MINI MINUTES: This matter comes on calendar this day, having been assigned from Department 501 for short cause trial.
Dept. 514, Judge: Joseph M. Quinn, Clerk: A. Mok, CSR: Mitch Lyon, #6840.

Daniel R. Stern, Esq., for the Plaintiff Parkmerced Owner, LLC, A Delaware limited liability,
Witness: Elizabeth Kershaw sworn and examined of behalf of the Plaintiff.
No appearance by Defendant Chengxiao Li, an individual.
Court ordered Defendants Does 1-10 dismissed without prejudice.

Plaintiff's Exhibits:
1-Notice of Time and Place of Trial and Settlement Hearing
2-Residential Residency Agreement
3-Three Day Notice to Pay Rent or Quit
4-Proof of Service of Summons
Court returned all exhibits to Plaintiff.

After evidence and good cause appearing, the Court enters Judgment in favor of Plaintiff and against defendant as follows:
The Lease is forfeited. Rental Agreement is canceled.
Restitution and Possession of the premises located at 405 Serrano Drive, 6-C, City and County of San Francisco, California 94132.

Damages $4,200.00
Holdover damages $17,360.00
Pre-judgment interest $0.00
Attorney's Fees $2,200.00
Costs $0.00
Credit $1950.00
for a Total Judgment of $21,810.00

Judgment signed in open court.

UD COURT TRIALS
Off Calendar Nov-07-2016 Assigned To Trial Court

OTHER SETTLEMENT CONFERENCE
Off Calendar Nov-03-2016 Off Calendar
MINI MINUTES: Line 2
Judge Pro Tem: Rachel Ehrlich, Clerk: M. Goodman, Not Reported. (D501/JPT)
Appearances:
Plaintiff Parkmerced Owner is present. Represented by Liz Kershaw.
Attorney Daniel Stern for the plaintiff.
Defendant Chengxiao Li is NOT present.
Mandarin Court Interpreter Hwa Shing/Shannon is present

The settlement conference is taken off calendar because there was no appearance by defendant. The trial date of November 7, 2016 remains on calendar. (501)
